subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath inhaled the fragrances of Revelation and hath attained recognition when the Tongue of Grandeur proclaimed: The Kingdom is God's [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن وجد نفحات الوحی و فاز بالاقرار اذ نطق لسان العظمه الملک لله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
